ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Aug-21-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Warren Woo for Josephine Liu (Executor).

Mr. Woo stated that the issue is the estate used to own real property, that it was sold, that there was a gain on the sale and the estate needs to file an income tax return. Mr. Woo also stated that he expects to have this done in 30-days and that he will file a petition for final distribution in 60-days. Status on close of estate is continued to August 21, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Woo that if he is not ready to do final distribution by then, he must file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1391 41st Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Warren Woo for Josephine Liu.
Jason Chan (listing agent) also present.

The sale was confirmed at $1,225,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 15, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2017 Continued To Oct-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Warren Wu for Josephine Liu (Petitioner).
Julian Lastowski for Anna Chen.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than September 20, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 27, 2017. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary and the Cross-Petition to Determine Heirship and Revoke Will are continued to and the Parties are to return on October 3, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Continued To May-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Warren Wu for Josephine Liu (Petitioner).
Julian Lastowski for Anna Chen (Petitioner).

Mr. Wu informed the Court that his Client just recently filed a response to the objection. Counsel reported that they had some discussion of settlement prior to filing of the objection, that a settlement offer was rejected, and that they spoke today about doing some discovery and then ADR, or pro bono mediation. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary and the Cross-Petition to Determine Heirship and Revoke Will are continued to May 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Duong. Not reported.

Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Continued To Jan-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Julian Lastowski for objector Anna Chen.

Mr. Lastowski stated that he represented the surviving spouse of the decedent, and that he would be filing an objection to the petition. The Court continued the hearing on the petition to January 18, 2017, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
